provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against claude. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
Diagnose Phase 1: turn one failing customer file into a
failing unit test at the importer seam, diffing parsed rows
against a known-good snapshot. With that loop in hand we
generate 3-5 ranked, falsifiable hypotheses (BOM bytes,
delimiter sniffing, header casing) and test them one at a
time.
